backend.bar: Strong fundamentals, scalability thinking, operational excellence
backend.portfolio_bar: Backend system supporting high throughput or complex business logic
backend.interview_format: Phone screening → 2 coding → 1 system design → on-site interviews

devops.interview_format: Technical phone → infrastructure design → 2 behavioral on-site

resume_requirements: Leadership principles alignment, ownership examples, metrics and impact
hiring_philosophy: Deep diver, bias for action, customer focus, frugality mindset
compensation_expectations: Competitive, large signing bonus for senior levels
career_path: Strong internal mobility, leadership development programs
knowledge_base: Emphasis on AWS knowledge and 'Well-Architected Framework'
